elements.original_description: Two smiling cartoon characters shaking hands on a pure white background, one character slightly taller than the other, both wearing casual colorful clothing. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of two smiling cartoon characters shaking hands on a pure white background. One character is slightly taller than the other. Both are wearing casual, colorful clothing. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. The scene conveys a warm, trusting mood.
